title: xyris stenocephala
intro: Xyris stenocephala, also known as the Yellow Eyebane, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xyris stenocephala include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
